nasb.text: In the twenty-seventh year of Jeroboam king of Israel, Azariah son of Amaziah king of Judah became king.

esv.text: In the twenty-seventh year of Jeroboam king of Israel, Azariah the son of Amaziah, king of Judah, began to reign.

cnv.text: 以色列王耶羅波安在位第二十七年，猶大王亞瑪謝的兒子亞撒利雅登基作王。

ccb.text: 以色列王耶罗波安执政第二十七年，犹大王亚玛谢的儿子亚撒利雅登基。
